utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am doing okay . I think it is going well . Do you think they are having fun ? Am I talking to fast ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Nope , sound like me . Pheebs , it is going great . Look at Chandler with little baby girl Chandler .

emotion_cause.span: 3_it is going great . Look at Chandler with little baby girl Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Little baby girl Chandler , where I have heard that before ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: When you are done over there , we kinda have a situation over here too .

emotion_cause.span: 7_we kinda have a situation over here too .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Na ... uh , no , we are all responsible for our own babies .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: See that is where I think that you are wrong . We have been playing these babies man for man . we should really be playing a zone defense .
